UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BASSIN, SCOTT I , DOING BUSINESS AS BRIDGEVIEW PROPERTIES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOFTUS, BRENDAN MARTIN, DESIREE $20,580.00 PRINCIPAL, $594.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $21,174.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 66042488)

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE DEC-07-2022 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT BRENDAN LOFTUS'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT AND SEAL RECORD, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MATTER IS TRANSFERRED TO BE HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 501 ON DECEMBER 21, 2022 AT 9:30 A.M. THAT DEPARTMENT HANDLES ALL LANDLORD-TENANT MATTERS PER SF LOCAL RULE 8.10A1. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS' NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT AND SEAL RECORD IS DENIED IN PART AND GRANTED IN PART. RELIEF SOUGHT UNDER CCP SECTION 437(D) IS DENIED. THE PRESUMPTION UNDER CCP SECTION 664 IS NOT OVERCOME. DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO RESTRICT ACCESS TO THE RECORD PER CCP 1161.2.5 IS GRANTED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: KENNETH B. HUNT; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Judgment And Seal Record (Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion; Declarration; And (Proposed) Order)
Off Calendar Dec-21-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Brendan Loftus; 415-412-8778; defendant in pro per, appearing on their own behalf.
Desiree Martin; 916-622-4210; defendant in pro per, appearing on their own behalf.
Scott I. Bassin; 415-754-5245; plaintiff in pro per, appearing on their own behalf.

Peter With, registered process server, is present.

Hearing held. Registered process server Peter With is placed under oath and testifies as to service of the summons and complaint. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments and live testimony the Court rules as follows:

DEFENDANTS' NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT AND SEAL RECORD is denied in part and granted in part. Relief sought under CCP Section 437(d) is denied. The presumption under CCP Section 664 is not overcome. Defendants' motion to restrict access to the record per CCP 1161.2.5 is granted.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Judgment And Seal Record (Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion; Declarration; And (Proposed) Order)
Off Calendar Dec-07-2022 Continued To Dec-21-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT BRENDAN LOFTUS's Motion To Set Aside Judgment And Seal Record.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is transferred to be heard in department 501 on December 21, 2022 at 9:30 a.m. That department handles all landlord-tenant matters per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
